PostToolUse.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *.py ]] && [[ -n "$file" ]]; then python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('$file').read())" 2>&1 && echo '✓ Syntax OK' || echo '✗ SYNTAX ERROR'; fi
PostToolUse.description: Syntax-check Python files after every edit

pulse.description: PULSE monitoring platform — query nodes, alerts, incidents, notifications
